name: Appetizer from Black Grapes (Mantala Od Grozd
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush grapes until you have a gallon of juice; strain.
2. Cook the juice on high heat until reduced to half its original volume.
3. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups whole wheat flour while stirring constantly over low flame.
4. Add 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg and 2 cups sugar before adding the flour.
5. Stir in lemon juice.
6. Pour mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan (2-inch deep).
7. Let cool completely in the pan for 2 days.
8. Slice into 2x3 inch squares.
9. Serve with drinks.
